sentences.arabic: تَعْكِسُ الْمَطْبَخُ الْمَغْرِبِيُّ تَنَوُّعَ الثَّقَافَاتِ الَّتِي تَعَاقَبَتْ عَلَى الْمِنْطَقَةِ عَبْرَ الْقُرُونِ.
sentences.translation: Marokanska kuhinja odražava raznolikost kultura koje su se smjenjivale u regiji kroz vijekove.
sentences.translationEn: Moroccan cuisine reflects the diversity of cultures that have passed through the region over the centuries.
